text:
(1) This part 6 shall be known and may be cited as the “Motorist Insurance Identification Database Program Act”.

(2) Repealed.
markdown:
## Title 42
#### Article 7. Motor Vehicle Fin. Responsibility Law
##### § 42-7-601 — Short title

(1) This part 6 shall be known and may be cited as the “Motorist Insurance Identification Database Program Act”.

(2) Repealed.

subsections.text: This part 6 shall be known and may be cited as the “Motorist Insurance Identification Database Program Act”.
